_comment: Sealed E2E latency reference. Updated only with `make bench-gate-e2e-save`. The bench-gate-e2e script fails CI if e2e_us.p50 regresses >10% from this value. Current p50=11780us reflects the cluster as-measured 2026-05-22 — see .ship/17-REFINE-2 and specs/2/22-perf-verification.md §6. The gate catches regression from this floor; it does NOT certify the <50us design budget.
